nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 莫納加斯州
nodes.summary: 莫納加斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括黃瘤鳳冠雉、Lined quail-dove、棕尾林蜂鸟等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Sucre antpitta
nodes.summary: Sucre antpitta（Sucre antpitta，学名 Grallaricula cumanensis），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于委內瑞拉海岸山脈、莫納加斯州，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 委內瑞拉海岸山脈
nodes.summary: 委內瑞拉海岸山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联33种鸟类，包括Band-tailed guan、紫冠雉、Venezuelan wood quail等33种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Range in Anzoátegui, western Sucre and northern Monagas states

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Range in Anzoátegui, western Sucre and northern Monagas states

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits the understory of humid montane forest heavy with epiphytes and mosses

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "There has been widespread clearance for agriculture in the Turimiquire Massif and the Paria Peninsula and both regions are considered highly threatened." Even areas within nominally protected Cueva del Guácharo National Park are cut and burned." "The extent to which the Sucre Antpitta tolerates disturbance is unknown, but large-scale clearing and burning is undoubtedly detrimental."
